metadata.title: Don't Turn Around (Groove Mix Extended)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:48.48] Don't tell me that you wanna leave (whoa, whoa, whoa)
[00:56.04] (Whoa, whoa, whoa)
[01:00.89] If you wanna leave
[01:04.74] I won't beg you to stay
[01:10.68] And if you gotta go, darlin'
[01:14.51] Maybe it's better that way
[01:20.37] I'm gonna be strong, I'm gonna do fine
[01:23.15] Don't worry about this heart of mine (walk out that door, see if I care)
[01:28.46] (Go out and go)
[01:30.02] But don't turn around
[01:32.05] 'Cause you're gonna see my heartbreaking
[01:35.43] Don't turn around
[01:37.32] I don't want you seeing me cry
[01:40.44] Just walk away
[01:42.30] It's tearing me apart that you're leaving, I'm letting you go
[01:49.90] But I won't let you know
[01:55.21] I won't let you know
[02:01.62] Whoa, whoa, whoa, whoa
[02:06.43] Whoa, whoa, whoa, whoa
[02:10.79] I won't miss your arms around me
[02:15.48] Holding me tight (holding me tight)
[02:21.07] And if you ever think about me
[02:24.65] Just know that I'll be alright (I'll be alright)
[02:31.00] I'm gonna be strong, I'm gonna do fine
[02:33.63] Don't worry about this heart of mine (I will survive, I'll make it through)
[02:38.64] (I'll even learn to live without you)
[02:40.66] Don't turn around
[02:42.59] 'Cause you're gonna see my heartbreaking
[02:45.78] Don't turn around
[02:47.30] I don't want you seeing me cry
[02:50.69] Just walk away
[02:52.56] It's tearing me apart that you're leaving, I'm letting you go
[02:59.24] But I won't let you know
[03:03.37] 
[03:32.49] I wish I could scream out loud that I love you
[03:37.49] I wish I could say to you, "Don't go"
[03:41.93] As he walks away, he feels the pain getting strong
[03:44.70] People in your life, they don't know what's going on
[03:46.96] Too proud to turn around, he's gone
[03:50.89] Don't turn around
[03:52.77] 'Cause you're gonna see my heartbreaking
[03:55.89] Don't turn around
[03:57.74] I don't want you seeing me cry
[04:01.10] Just walk away
[04:02.81] It's tearing me apart that you're leaving, I'm letting you go
[04:10.49] Baby, don't turn around (whoa, whoa, whoa, whoa)
[04:15.91] Don't turn around (whoa, whoa, whoa, whoa)
[04:20.72] (Just walk away, hey) just walk away (whoa, whoa, whoa, whoa)
[04:25.50] It's tearing me apart that you're leaving, I'm letting you go
[04:31.03] Don't turn around
[04:36.05] Don't turn around
[04:40.80] Just walk away
[04:45.82] Don't turn around
